method: Superposition of parent compound N(E_F) -- ESTIMATE, not DFT
source: Published LDA/GGA (Singh & Pickett 1994, Novikov 2011) [UNVERIFIED - training data]; Published LDA (Lee & Pickett 2004, Botana & Norman 2020) [UNVERIFIED - training data]
caveats: PBEsol without +U may overestimate metallic bandwidth by 20-40%
Interface charge transfer may shift E_F relative to parent bands
